title: Crispy Corn
instructions:
Grease a 2qt casserole dish and set aside.
In a large bowl combine the bread cubes and onion. Add the whole corn, creamed corn, and milk.
Season with the sugar, salt and pepper. Stir to combine. Add to the prepared baking dish.
In a small bowl toss the cereal with the melted butter and sprinkle over the top of the corn mixture.
Bake uncovered for 45 minutes.
